content: I, Arjun Mehta, resident of Sector 12, Rajiv Nagar, Ghaziabad, am a licensed contractor. On 10.10.2023, I approached the Ghaziabad Municipal Corporation to obtain an expedited building permit for my residential project. I was told by Mr. Ramesh Kumar, the Junior Clerk, that the process would take 45 days normally but could be done in 7 days if I paid ₹50,000 in cash. I recorded our WhatsApp conversation where he explicitly said, 'Bhaiya, yeh sab formalities ke liye 50 hazaar cash chahiye, aur phir aapka permit 7 din mein mil jayega.' I immediately informed the ACB. On 12.10.2023, I went to his office at 3:15 PM with ₹50,000 in marked notes provided by ACB. I handed him the envelope in his cabin. He took it, put it in his pocket, and smiled. Within moments, ACB officers entered and arrested him. I had no prior relationship with Mr. Kumar except this transaction. I did not give the money to anyone else. I swear this statement is true to the best of my knowledge.
